extensionDescription.message: A Chrome extension that changes Enter to newline and moves send to a shortcut key in AI chat UIs.

popupDescription.message: On supported chat inputs, Enter inserts a newline, while the platform send shortcut sends the message.

globalSettingsHint.message: Turning this off also stops all per-site settings below.

enabledDescription.message: Enable the Enter and send-shortcut behavior change on all supported sites.

siteSettingsHint.message: These settings apply only when the global setting is on.

chatgptDescription.message: Change key behavior in ChatGPT chat inputs.

claudeDescription.message: Change key behavior in Claude chat inputs.

geminiDescription.message: Change key behavior in Gemini chat inputs.
